recommendations.title: Nowhere to Run
recommendations.overview: Escaped convict Sam Gillen single-handedly takes on ruthless developers who are determined to evict a widow with two young children.

recommendations.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
recommendations.genres: Drama, Crime, Thriller, Mystery, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Jesse Stone looks into the murder of a teen-age girl whose body is found floating in a local lake, it brings him up against the Boston mob and into the affluent world of a bestselling writer who exploits troubled teens.

recommendations.title: Stone Cold
recommendations.overview: Jesse Stone is a former L.A. homicide detective who left behind the big city and an ex-wife to become the police chief of the quiet New England fishing town of Paradise. Stone's old habits die hard as he continues to indulge his two favorite things:

recommendations.title: Highwaymen
recommendations.overview: James Cray watched as his wife was killed by Fargo, a hit-and-run serial murderer. After severely injuring Fargo and going to prison for several years, James is now determined to avenge his wife's death. He drives across the country looking for Fargo

recommendations.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
recommendations.overview: Police Chief Jesse Stone's relationship with his ex-wife worsens, and he fears he's relapsing into alcoholism. To get his mind off his problems, Jesse begins working on the unsolved murder of a bank teller shot during a robbery. Also, his investigati

recommendations.title: Jesse Stone: Lost in Paradise
recommendations.overview: Police Chief Jesse Stone now presides over the quiet, seaside village of Paradise, Massachusetts. When the facts don't add up in a brutal Boston-area murder case, Jesse opens an investigation filled with surprises, unlikely suspects and grave danger.

recommendations.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage

recommendations.title: Virus: 32
recommendations.overview: A virus is unleashed and a chilling massacre runs through the streets of Montevideo.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.
